hours: Monday to Saturday, 9am to 7pm. Closed on Sundays.

botox.description: Anti-wrinkle injections to smooth expression lines. Results last 3-4 months.

fillers.description: Dermal fillers for volume, lip enhancement, and contouring. Results last 6-12 months.

consultation.description: A complimentary 1-on-1 consultation with a qualified practitioner to discuss your goals.

booking.cancellation_policy: 24-hour cancellation notice required. Late cancellations may incur a fee.
booking.deposit: A deposit may be required for some treatments. Confirmed at time of booking.

practitioners: All treatments are carried out by qualified and insured aesthetic practitioners.
aftercare: Aftercare instructions are provided following every treatment.
escalate_if: more than 2 unanswered questions in a row
explicit request to speak to a human
